results.title: Hull FC's season write off accusation undefendable with hope clung to same frustrating promise
results.description: Hull FC's season hit a new low at York - with the acquisition the campaign was written off months ago seemingly undefendable.

results.title: What time is Arthur Fery playing today? When to watch his Wimbledon 2026 semi-final vs Alexander Zverev
results.description: SENSATIONAL Brit wildcard Arthur Fery has sent shockwaves through SW19 by marching all the way to the Wimbledon semi-finals. The 23-year-old's bona fide "Ferytale" has gripped the nation - and even garnered a royal seal of approval. Queen Camilla was spotted in Centre Court's Royal Box taking in his quarter-final victory earlier this week, while...
